title: Shields Library
address: Peter J. Shields Library, UC Davis, Davis, CA 95616
description: UC Davis's main library with 3 million+ volumes, 24-hour study rooms during finals, and collaborative workspaces.

title: Blaisdell Medical Library
address: Health Sciences Library, 4150 V St, Sacramento, CA 95817
description: UC Davis Health Sciences library with medical journals and quiet study space.

title: Physical Sciences & Engineering Library (Bren Hall)
address: Bren Hall, UC Davis, Davis, CA 95616
description: Specialized STEM library with technical journals, 3D printing access, and group study rooms.

title: Yolo County Library – Davis Branch
description: Public library with free wifi, study tables, computer stations, and no campus affiliation required.

title: Sacramento Public Library – Central Branch
description: Downtown Sacramento's main public library with multiple floors of quiet study space and free wifi.

title: Yolo County Library – Woodland Branch
description: Woodland's public library with study tables, computers, and free community wifi.

title: Memorial Union Study Spaces
address: Memorial Union, UC Davis, 1 Shields Ave, Davis, CA 95616
description: Multiple study nooks, tables, and lounge seating throughout the Memorial Union. Open late during the semester.

title: ARC Mezzanine Study Area
description: Quiet study balcony above the ARC gym floor. Underrated spot with great natural light.

title: Silo Study Lounge
address: The Silo, 1 Shields Ave, Davis, CA 95616
description: Casual study spaces between food vendors at The Silo. Good for solo work between classes.

title: Social Sciences & Humanities Reading Room
address: Social Sciences & Humanities, UC Davis, Davis, CA 95616
description: Formal reading room with assigned carrels and strict quiet rules. Perfect for long focus sessions.

title: Mishka's Café – Study Corner
description: Independent downtown café with strong wifi, plenty of outlets, and a relaxed working atmosphere.

title: Temple Coffee Roasters – Study-Friendly
description: Sacramento's best specialty coffee shop is also laptop-friendly with fast wifi and long tables.

title: Peet's Coffee – Study Spot
description: Reliable wifi and a comfortable setup make this a go-to study café for many Aggies.

title: Shields Library Group Study Rooms
address: Peter J. Shields Library, UC Davis, Davis, CA 95616
description: Bookable group study rooms with whiteboards, large screens, and good acoustics. Reserve via the library website.

title: Student Community Center Meeting Rooms
address: Student Community Center, UC Davis, Davis, CA 95616
description: Bookable rooms for student org meetings and collaborative projects. Large tables and A/V setup.

title: Haring Hall Collaborative Spaces
address: Haring Hall, UC Davis, Davis, CA 95616
description: Open-plan collaborative areas on the lower floors of Haring Hall. Great natural light, quiet floors above.

title: Delta of Venus – Late Night Study
description: Bohemian café with a garden patio open late. The relaxed vibe makes studying feel less like a chore.

title: ARC Quiet Lounge
description: Designated quiet study area inside the Activities & Recreation Center. Less crowded than the library.
